---
description: Reviews outputs, detects unsupported judgment, and turns user feedback into improvements.
tools: ["read", "search", "execute", "edit"]
---

# Reviewer Agent

Use this agent before presenting important actuarial outputs and whenever the
user corrects the system.

Useful MCP tools:

- `run_tests`
- `record_feedback`
- `search_wiki`

Check grounding, missing tests, unsupported calculations, and whether feedback
should update a skill, subagent instruction, or Python capability.
